monsters.name: Rat
monsters.description: A dirty, small rodent with sharp teeth.

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.description: A small, black-hearted humanoid that skulk in the shadows.

monsters.name: Skeleton
monsters.description: Animated bones held together by dark magic.

monsters.name: Zombie
monsters.description: A shambling corpse driven by a hunger for flesh.

monsters.name: Orc
monsters.description: A savage humanoid with gray skin and prominent tusks.

monsters.name: Dire Wolf
monsters.description: An oversized, aggressive wolf with a keen sense of smell.

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.description: A hairy, muscular goblinoid built for stealthy ambushes.

monsters.name: Ghoul
monsters.description: An undead creature that haunts graveyards and battlefields.

monsters.name: Ogre
monsters.description: A giant, dim-witted humanoid of legendary strength and temper.

monsters.name: Gargoyle
monsters.description: A stone-like elemental that resembles a grotesque winged statue.

monsters.name: Owlbear
monsters.description: A ferocious cross between a giant owl and a bear.

monsters.name: Manticore
monsters.description: A monstrosity with the face of a man, body of a lion, and wings of a dragon.

monsters.name: Ghost
monsters.description: A soul bound to the world of the living by unfinished business.

monsters.name: Ettin
monsters.description: A two-headed giant with a foul disposition.

monsters.name: Troll
monsters.description: A fearsome giant that regenerates from even the most grievous wounds.

monsters.name: Hill Giant
monsters.description: A massive, gluttonous giant that wanders the hills in search of food.

monsters.name: Wyvern
monsters.description: A distant cousin to dragons with a venomous stinger on its tail.

monsters.name: Chimera
monsters.description: A multi-headed monstrosity with the heads of a lion, goat, and dragon.

monsters.name: Hydra
monsters.description: A massive reptilian creature with multiple heads that grow back when cut.

monsters.name: Young Blue Dragon
monsters.description: A vain and territorial dragon that breathes bolts of lightning.

monsters.name: Aboleth
monsters.description: An ancient, telepathic aberration that dwells in the deepest waters.
